artPrompt: A lean human acolyte in a black-and-bone robe extending a collection bowl with a thin persuasive smile, cold gold coins glinting within, a faint halo behind his shadowed face, guttering candles and drifting ash framing him, the clock tower hazy in the blood-dark distance, a tender predatory devotion in the diffuse light, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Tithe Collector Acolyte
text:
Whenever Tithe Collector Acolyte attacks, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Render unto the End what is the End's.
Whenever an opponent rolls one or more dice or flips one or more coins, that player loses 1 life unless they pay {1} as a gambling tithe.
flavorText: "You can't take it with you. Especially not where we're all going. So leave it with me."
